description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black and tan color scheme. It features a collapsible stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine, all in a tan polymer material. The upper receiver is equipped with a carry handle and integrated iron sights, while the handguard is ribbed for grip and also tan in color. The barrel is standard length and ends with a flash hider. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement rifles.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible tan stock, black metal receiver, and ribbed tan handguard, featuring a flash hider and iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the flash hider and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and carry handle with iron sights.
description_view_2: Viewed from the stock end, highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the handguard, magazine, and stock details.
